title: Consent Expired Before Execution
scenario: A procedure was authorized while consent was active, but the consent validity window expires before execution.
state_transition: The consent validity period expired before execution.
execution_boundary: The procedure is evaluated at the execution boundary.
constitutional_evaluation: Consent must remain temporally valid when execution occurs.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because expired consent cannot support current execution.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when consent expires before execution.
